'''Matt Turhaya''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and the husband of [[Anii Degarienne]] as well as the father of their child, [[Alexandra Winger]].

==Biography==
Born on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] in [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], Turhaya married [[Anii Degarienne]], also of that [[Planet/Legends|world]], in [[13 BBY/Legends|13 BBY]]. Shortly after their marriage he joined the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]] and attended [[Carida Academy/Legends|Academy of Carida]] where his daughter [[Alexandra Winger]] was born. A few weeks before Turhaya graduated from the Academy, Degarienne was killed in an accident at the weapons factory where she worked. Unknown to Turhaya, her death was not an accident but a deliberate act of sabotage.

Turhaya took his daughter to his in-law's home on [[Janara III]] while he served in the Imperial Navy. Within two or three years he realized that he no longer aspired to serve an Empire that denied freedom and destroyed lives; as a result, Turhaya deserted. He returned to Janara III to discover it had been [[Raid on Janara III|devastated]] by the Empire. Thinking that his daughter was dead, Turhaya sought comfort with the bottle and gambling after he moved in with his older brother Jamie in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Jamie owned a [[Turhaya's Landspeeder Repair Shop|speeder repair shop]] there. In [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]], Turhaya met Captain [[Tere Metallo]], a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Turhaya signed on as her co-pilot on the ''[[Star Quest]]'' to pay off his debt from a [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] game.

{{Char-stub}}

By [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], Matt Turhaya had become [[Commander/Legends|commander]] in the [[New Republic Special Forces/Legends|New Republic Special Forces]]. Shortly after the end of the [[Thrawn campaign]], he fought for the [[Battle of Garos|liberation]] of [[Garos IV]], but he was killed before having ever met his daughter. Alexandra later identified Turhaya as her father and learnt his tragic fate on her world.<ref name="SoG" />
